summary: Centering standing pose with feet together and palms together at heart to begin practice.
voice_script_short: Grounding  both feet and breathe steadily.

summary: Gentle standing upper back extension with arms overhead.
contraindications: Low back pain keep neutral spine
voice_script_short: while reaching up lengthen spine instead of collapsing backward.

summary: Forward fold to lengthen posterior chain and calm the nervous system.
exhale_cue: Fold from hips and relax neck

common_mistakes.mistake: move forward and down from lower back

voice_script_short: Bend your knees as needed and let the head hang lightly.

summary: Deep squat (Indian squat), stretches groin and back, strengthens hips.
alignment_cues: push inner thighs out with elbows to open chest
contraindications: knee pain sitting on low chair
benefits: streches lower back and hip and ankles
voice_script_short: go down and sit in deep squat and open chest by pushing inner thighs outward.

summary: Low lunge opening hip flexors while building balance.
voice_script_short: Keep front knee stacked over ankle and breathe into the hips.

summary: Foundational core and shoulder strength pose in a straight line.
voice_script_short: Create one long line from head to heels.

summary: Inverted V pose for full-body length and shoulder stability.
avoid_conditions: shoulder or Back or wrist Injuries
voice_script_short: Bend your knees to keep the spine long.

summary: Neutral standing posture used as baseline for alignment and breath.
exhale_cue: Root through all four corners of feet
voice_script_short: Stand tall, steady, and effortless.

summary: Strong lateral stance building leg endurance and focus.
alignment_cues: Back foot 90 degree of Front leg
voice_script_short: Press both feet down and widen across the collarbones.

summary: Gentle backbend strengthening upper back and opening chest.
contraindications: Acute low back pain keep very low
voice_script_short: Lift the heart forward, not just up.

summary: Raising arms above head and squat-like standing pose for legs and core.
voice_script_short: Sit back as if into a chair, chest lifted.

summary: Lunge with hands overhead reach to build strength and stability.
voice_script_short: Anchor your back foot and rise through the fingertips.

summary: Lateral extension pose improving hamstring and side-body mobility.
inhale_cue: Lengthen side part of body first
voice_script_short: Reach long before lowering your hand.

summary: Side-body opening from a lunge with forearm support.
contraindications: Shoulder pain keep hand on hip
voice_script_short: Press forearm gently into thigh and reach long through top side.

summary: Wide stance forward fold for hamstrings and inner thighs.
alignment_cues: Feet parallel more than should width apart
palms holding toe or on mat
voice_script_short: Keep weight even across both feet.

summary: Halfway lift to reset spinal length between folds.
contraindications: Low back pain keep hands high
voice_script_short: Find a tabletop spine and breathe into your back body.

summary: Classic standing fold for posterior release and quiet focus.
contraindications: Disc issues move gently and avoid forcing
voice_script_short: Let the fold be soft and spacious, not forced.

summary: Hamstring-focused fold with controlled shorter stance.
voice_script_short: Square your hips and fold with length.

summary: Single-leg balance with foot at ankle/calf (not knee).
voice_script_short: Steady your gaze and breathe slow to find balance.

summary: Shoulder and upper-back opening arm bind done seated or standing.
modifications: Hug shoulders instead of full bind
voice_script_short: Wrap and lift the elbows, then soften your breath.

summary: Comfortable cross-legged seat for breath and grounding.
voice_script_short: Find a comfortable seat where breath feels effortless.

summary: Seated hip opener with soles of feet together.
voice_script_short: Sit tall and let the hips open gradually.

summary: Asymmetrical seated fold over left leg.
contraindications: Hamstring issues keep bend in extended knee
voice_script_short: Lengthen first, then fold only as far as breath stays smooth.

summary: Asymmetrical seated fold over right leg.
voice_script_short: Keep the fold patient and even on both sides.

summary: Gentle seated fold prioritizing spinal length over depth without bending knees

common_mistakes.mistake: Forcing touch toes by rounding back

voice_script_short: straighten knees and keep your heart reaching forward.

summary: Wide seated straddle with upright torso for safe hip opening.
voice_script_short: Choose width that lets your spine stay tall.

summary: Shoulder mobility drill with one arm overhead and one behind.
modifications: Practice one arm at a time
voice_script_short: Use a strap and focus on smooth breath over depth.

summary: Foundational seated alignment pose.
alignment_cues: Hands by hips or on mat
voice_script_short: Sit tall and active, as if in mountain pose seated.

summary: Kneeling seat for breathing and digestion support.
voice_script_short: Choose enough support so the knees feel easy.

summary: Spinal flexion movement to mobilize back and warm up.
voice_script_short: On your exhale, dome the upper back evenly.

summary: Spinal extension counterpart to Cat pose.
voice_script_short: Move with breath, keeping the low back supported.

summary: Shoulder and thoracic opener threading left arm under body.
voice_script_short: Let the twist come from your upper back, not your low back.

summary: Shoulder and thoracic opener threading right arm under body.
voice_script_short: Breathe into the upper back and keep hips steady.

summary: Kneeling lunge opening right hip flexor with left leg forward.
voice_script_short: Keep front heel rooted and chest broad.

summary: Kneeling lunge opening left hip flexor with right leg forward.
voice_script_short: Stay tall and steady as you ease into the hips.

summary: Hamstring stretch with front left leg extended.
voice_script_short: Flex the front foot and fold only with a long back.

summary: Hamstring stretch with front right leg extended.
voice_script_short: Move slowly and keep the breath smooth.

summary: Child’s pose variation reaching to left side for lateral stretch.
voice_script_short: Send breath into the open side body.

summary: Child’s pose variation reaching to right side for lateral stretch.
voice_script_short: Rest deeply and breathe into your side waist.

summary: Forearm backbend opening chest with low lumbar load.
contraindications: Acute low back pain keep minimal
voice_script_short: Broaden the collarbones and keep the neck long.

summary: Back-body strengthening pose with lifted chest/legs.
modifications: Lift one leg at a time
voice_script_short: Lift small and long, not high and tense.

summary: Resting prone pose for breath recovery and low-back relaxation.
modifications: Turn head side to side gently
voice_script_short: Let the belly and back body move with each breath.

summary: Supine backbend strengthening glutes and opening front body.
voice_script_short: Press through your feet and lift with control.

summary: Gentle supine pose to release low back and settle breath.
voice_script_short: Hug the knees softly and let the breath slow down.

summary: Reclined spinal twist with knees to left, shoulders grounded.
contraindications: Disc pain keep gentle and supported
voice_script_short: Keep both shoulders heavy as the knees move left.

summary: Reclined spinal twist with knees to right, shoulders grounded.
contraindications: Acute back pain keep very mild
voice_script_short: Let the twist be soft and supported.

summary: Final relaxation pose integrating benefits of practice.
contraindications: Severe anxiety may prefer guided rest
voice_script_short: Allow gravity to hold you completely.

summary: Simple heel-to-toe standing balance for proprioception.
voice_script_short: Find one point to gaze at and breathe steadily.

summary: Beginner standing right leg quad stretch holding ankle back with opposite arm forward.
voice_script_short: Keep knees close and chest lifted.

summary: Beginner standing left leg quad stretch holding ankle back with opposite arm forward.
voice_script_short: Keep knees close and chest lifted.

summary: Hip-hinge balance prep with hands on hips extending right leg back
voice_script_short: Reach long from crown to heel.

summary: Hip-hinge balance prep with hands on hips extending left leg back
voice_script_short: Reach long from crown to heel.

summary: Kneeling prep for Down Dog emphasizing shoulder flexion.
voice_script_short: Press the floor and lengthen from hands to hips.

summary: Supine hip opener holding feet/shins.
voice_script_short: Hold gently and let the breath widen the hips.

summary: Reclined restorative hip opener with soles together.
voice_script_short: Let gravity open the hips without forcing.
